task_completion.description: Verify that a new folder named 'Vendor-Escalations' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder pane or sidebar of the email client displays a folder named exactly 'Vendor-Escalations'.

task_completion.description: Verify that relevant emails discussing patches, updates, rules, or configurations have been moved into the 'Vendor-Escalations' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Vendor-Escalations' folder is selected and its message list shows at least 3 emails (e.g., subjects mentioning SAdev, ILUG, patches, or updates).

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has opened a compose window to reply to or reference one of the emails from the 'Vendor-Escalations' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An active email compose window is visible, showing it is a reply (e.g., 'Re:' in the subject line) or quoting an original email from the vendor threads.

task_completion.description: Verify that the CC and BCC fields are correctly populated with the required addresses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CC field contains 'vendor-manager@acmecorp.com' and the BCC field contains 'compliance@acmecorp.com' in the compose window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the email body requests a deployment timeline, a risk assessment, and the name of a point-of-contact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the email body explicitly asks for a 'deployment timeline' (or timeline), a 'risk assessment', and a 'point of contact' (or POC) for follow-up.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the actual email client GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the email client interface (e.g., BlueMail) being used, rather than terminal commands, scripts, or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the emails in the folder are the actual emails from the inbox and not manually fabricated by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: The emails in the 'Vendor-Escalations' folder have authentic subjects and sender details matching the original inbox contents (e.g., SpamAssassin mailing lists).

integrity.description: Ensure the email draft is written in the email client's compose window.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draft text, CC, and BCC fields are entered into the standard email composition interface of the mail application, not a separate notepad or word processor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target folder must be named exactly 'Vendor-Escalations' and contain a minimum of 3 emails. The CC address must be 'vendor-manager@acmecorp.com' and the BCC address must be 'compliance@acmecorp.com'. The emails are authentic technical mailing list messages from the SpamAssassin public corpus (e.g., SAdev, ILUG, exmh-workers), with 84% discussing patches/updates.
